§6Red Phosphorus§f

§aA common allotrope found in the Nether — used for matches and incendiary weapons.§f

Red phosphorus ore generates in the Nether (24 veins/chunk, Y 0–127). Also produced by centrifuging blaze rods.

§6Sources§f:
§b• Nether ore§f: mine directly
§b• Centrifuge§f: blaze rod → 2 blaze powder + 2 red phosphorus
§b• Cyclotron§f: lithium dust + quartz powder

§6Uses§f:
§b• Matches§f: single-use fire lighters
§b• Incendiary weapons§f
§b• Furnace fuel§f: 32 operations

§c⚠ Block form is pyrophoric in your inventory — catches fire. Store safely.
